name: 40 Clove Garlic Chicken (Svmf28b) 1i29
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a frying pan.
2. Add the oil and brown the chicken well on both sides.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan.
4. Add the garlic and sauté for about a minute.
5. Add the dry vermouth and stir.
6. Return the chicken to the pan, placing it on top of the garlic.
7. Cover and simmer for about one hour, turning the chicken occasionally.
8. When done, serve the chicken with the cloves of garlic. The garlic will pop out of its shell easily. You can either mash it onto hot bread or eat it plain with the chicken. The garlic caramelize when cooked with the vermouth and is almost sweet-tasting.
